name: Banana Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (4 servings) vanilla ice cream or pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice bananas and place them in the prepared pie shell.
2. Prepare the pie filling according to package directions, using 2 1/2 cups of milk.
3. Fold in half a cup of the whipped topping into the pie mixture.
4. Pour the filling over the banana slices in the shell.
5. Chill the pie for at least 3 hours.
6. Top with remaining whipped topping and garnish with banana slices and mint, if desired.
